_comment: Prod Cube workspace registry. Loaded in the container via WORKSPACES_CONFIG_PATH (see docker-compose.prod.yml) so the local-dev workspaces.config.json stays unchanged. Prod cube-dev is open (no token) and prefix-namespaced; URLs live here, NOT in .env — the gateway resolves workspace id -> cubeApiUrl from this file (SSRF guard).

workspaces._comment: PLACEHOLDER. URL/port + gameModel/authMode to be set once the new cube-dev service goes live; until then selecting this workspace will error (host not reachable).
workspaces.label: Local cube-dev
